notes: Solid Space Invaders implementation with proper alien marching, shields, mystery ship, and death animations, but shield erosion collision detection has a minor bug (passing absolute coords instead of local) and alien march step-size is small (2px) making movement feel slow early on.
An exceptionally well-crafted Space Invaders clone with destructible shields, authentic alien marching logic, mystery UFO, and synthesized Web Audio sound effects.

A solid and mostly complete Space Invaders clone with good classic presentation, but movement pacing, simplistic enemy step behavior, and a few rough implementation details keep it from feeling polished or benchmark-top-tier.
